bibl.title: Rāmakarṇarasāyaṇastava
Rāmastavakarṇarasāyana
Rāmakarṇāmṛta
bibl.note: One of the 9 hymns that are printed in the Stavamaṇimālā as Sarasvatī Vilāsa Series 6 (ed. Subrahmanya Sastri)
See Thiruvengadathan pg. 17 and Raghavan introduction to Śāhendravilāsa pg. 41
The term 'rasāyana' in the title of the hymn and 'niṣyanada' to signify the parts of the hymn both allude to its value as treatment for the minds of poets (see Sinhā pg. 300)
The hymn describes various exploits, stories, and anecdotes of Rāma (see Sinhā pg. 300)
